summary: Governance Layer testing complete. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 4 tabs working: Entitlement (tier summary cards, tenant list with drill-down), Metering (today/monthly usage, active tenants, top tenants), Feature Flags (list, create, toggle, kill switch, delete), Onboarding (progress bars, tenant checklist). Fixed a critical bug in entitlement.py where cross-tenant admin queries were using tenant-isolated db instead of _raw_db.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: entitlement.py check_quota() and get_tenant_entitlements() were using tenant-isolated db for cross-tenant admin queries - changed to _raw_db

All data-testid attributes properly set for testing: governance-title, governance-tabs, entitlements-tab, metering-tab, feature-flags-tab, onboarding-tab, create-flag-btn, flag-key-input, save-flag-btn, tenant-row-{id}, top-tenant-{n}, onboard-row-{id}, flag-card-{key}, flag-toggle-{key}
Turkish language properly implemented throughout the UI (Entitlement, Metering, Feature Flags, Onboarding labels)
Feature flag system supports: percentage rollout, tenant overrides, kill switch, expiry dates
seed_data_creation: Created test feature flag TEST_governance_test_flag during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Governance Layer is fully functional. Test file test_governance_layer_api.py covers all endpoints: entitlements overview, tenant entitlements, usage overview, tenant usage, feature flags CRUD, tenant overrides, onboarding overview, tenant onboarding, mark step complete, quota checks. Frontend uses shadcn/ui components (Tabs, Card, Badge, Dialog, Switch, Input). Navigation accessible at /admin/governance. Existing feature flag: new_booking_flow (25% rollout, disabled).

entitlements.GET /api/admin/tenants/{tenant_id}/quota: Returns allowed, current, limit for rooms/users

feature_flags.POST /api/admin/feature-flags: Creates/updates flag with enabled, rollout_percentage, kill_switch, expires_at
feature_flags.GET /api/admin/feature-flags/{flag_key}/: Checks if flag enabled for tenant

onboarding.GET /api/admin/onboarding/overview: Lists all tenants with progress_pct, completed, total

frontend_tabs.entitlement: Tier summary cards (30 total, 1 enterprise, 28 basic, 1 professional), tenant list with module counts, drill-down dialog showing quotas and modules
frontend_tabs.metering: Today/monthly usage cards, active tenants (7 days), top tenants list with drill-down
frontend_tabs.feature_flags: Flag list with toggle, kill switch, delete buttons. Create dialog with all fields. Existing flag: new_booking_flow
frontend_tabs.onboarding: Tenant list with progress bars, drill-down checklist with auto-detection

bug_fixed.issue: Cross-tenant access blocked error when admin queries entitlements for other tenants
bug_fixed.root_cause: check_quota() and get_tenant_entitlements() were using tenant-isolated db.rooms.count_documents() and db.users.count_documents() instead of _raw_db for cross-tenant admin queries
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use _raw_db for all cross-tenant queries in admin context
